name: scoping-suite
description: PolyAI SC scoping pipeline. /scope-deal turns discovery into one Markdown source of truth that generates a client call flow (HTML→PDF), a scoping document (.docx, doubles as handoff), and a populated PS Level-of-Effort calculator (Google Sheet). Pulls deal context from Salesforce and calls from Gong by account name, or accepts pasted notes. Also includes call-flow-design, scoping-doc, use-case-summary, build-demo, and demo-narrative.
